sources.title: Retail Dive: Edge Computing Adoption Survey Results
IDC Retail Edge Infrastructure Spending Forecast

result.summary: Edge computing adoption in retail is accelerating at 34% CAGR, driven by real-time inventory management, computer vision for loss prevention, and personalized in-store experiences, with 62% of top-100 retailers piloting edge solutions by end of 2024.
key_findings: Computer vision at the edge is the top use case with 45% of retail edge deployments focused on loss prevention and checkout-free experiences
Latency-sensitive applications like dynamic pricing and real-time inventory tracking are driving 34% CAGR in retail edge infrastructure spend
Hybrid edge-cloud architectures dominate with 78% of retailers preferring cloud-managed edge nodes over fully autonomous edge deployments
